title: Dude Perfect: The Hero Tour
overview: A  brand-new, immersive experience designed for families and superfans to see The Dudes up close like never before. Be a part of the Dudes’ sold-out Hero Tour with the best seat in the house in the first-ever cinematic look. The show is full of action-packed battles, classic segments, and exclusive backstage access. Even if you have been to the show, you've never seen Dude Perfect like this!
